summary: R2 addresses lead REQUEST_CHANGES before QA route. The M6 manifest hash now includes claim text and competingInterpretations, so compiled-pack claim-record content changes affect deterministic manifest output. M6 source/runtime string-array validation now rejects empty string entries, and content-tools formal-claim semantics also treats empty sourceIds/sourcePassages as unsourced. FICTIONAL claims with empty source arrays remain valid.

tests_run.result: 1 test file passed; 28 tests passed. New R2 tests cover empty formal claim source/passage entries and manifest hash changes for claim text and competing interpretations.
M1/M2/M3/M6 fixtures validated; M6 manifestHash is now 6d1f6d64 after expanded claim-content hash coverage.
Architecture check passed; sim determinism matched Node/Worker hashes; root Vitest 37 files / 270 tests passed; Web Vitest 1 file / 4 tests passed.
R2 handoff JSON validated against project schema.
Final status lists task allowed-path changes plus unrelated untracked ui-samples/ left untouched.

decisions: Expanded M6 deterministic manifest hash input to include every claim-record field emitted in the compiled runtime pack, including claim text and competingInterpretations.
Tightened M6 source and runtime string-array validators so arrays may be empty where semantically allowed, but present entries must be non-empty strings.
Kept FICTIONAL claims with empty sourceIds/sourcePassages valid; formal non-fictional claims with empty source or passage entries are rejected.
Kept the task scoped to validation data and reference IDs only; no diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, map, policy, event, encyclopedia, or victory system implementation was added.
risks: The M6 manifest hash changed from 15f4c10c to 6d1f6d64 because it now covers additional claim-record content; this is an intentional deterministic compatibility change before acceptance.
Historical content remains Alpha validation scaffolding with RESEARCH_REQUIRED/SUMMARY_ONLY source status where full page verification has not been done.
Unrelated untracked ui-samples/ remains present and untouched.
requested_action: Proceed with independent QA review of the R2 diff and updated tests.
